body_txt: Hatred and other related emotions like resentment, envy, and spite often drive people to do horrible things to the targets of these feelings. However, like any emotion, hatred can cloud people's judgement and lead to poor decisions and short-sighted behavior . Prioritizing personal hate over common sense can easily lead to various consequences, such as losing potential allies, starting avoidable conflicts, arrest, injury, and death . When it comes to cooperation, while some people can work together with people they dislike out of a desire for personal gain or necessity, others will refuse to work with a disliked party even if it is disadvantageous for them. If a person is offered assistance by someone they hate, expect someone with this mentality to refuse the help. Even in cases in which someone is willing or forced to work with or accept help from a hated person, it's not unknown for someone whose hatred outweighs their common sense to try and harm the target of their hate at the first opportunity even if not hurting them would prove to be beneficial. While it's natural to conflict with people that one hates, some people go out of their way to antagonize people they dislike even if it's a bad idea. If a hated person is more powerful or dangerous than a hater or at least is capable of meaningfully retaliating, someone with more hate than a sense of self-preservation will antagonize said powerful person , which naturally tends to end poorly for the hater. Some hateful people will even resort to resort to breaking laws just to spite someone, which naturally leads to someone suffering legal consequences. Even worse, sometimes a person will still insist on antagonizing the target of their hate even when they do suffer for it, which just adds to their suffering. Sub-Trope of Took a Level in Dumbass . Opposite Trope to Love Makes You Dumb . Super-Trope to Bigotry Before Reason , which is about hatred against groups of people rather than individuals, and Revenge Before Reason , which covers cases of revenge. See also Blinded by Rage , Fury-Fueled Foolishness , Fear-Induced Idiocy , Greed Makes You Dumb , and Lust Makes You Dumb for other emotions that drive people to behave stupidly. Compare Irrational Hatred for when the source of the hate is without any logical basis. Also compare Personal Hate Before Common Goals and A Tragedy of Impulsiveness . Contrast The Power of Hate , which involves hatred being beneficial rather than detrimental. Envious examples might also be The Resenter , a Green-Eyed Monster , and/or Driven by Envy . May lead to a Shut Up, Hannibal! or a "The Reason You Suck" Speech if someone addresses the fact that someone has let their hate blind them so much that they don't even know what they're doing anymore. May crossover with Evil Is Petty , Detrimental Determination , His Own Worst Enemy , and Mugging the Monster . A character who is guilty of this trope is unlikely to Know When to Fold 'Em towards the targets of their hate, and any consequences they suffer are almost always treated as Laser-Guided Karma . Has nothing to do with Hate Dumb , which refers to someone who takes their hatred towards a fictional work to idiotic levels. Also has nothing to do with Sub-Par Supremacist , wherein a person is portrayed as stupid for their hatred of minorities rather than for hating one specific person.
